name: hidream-o1
notes_low: Downloads drbaph HiDream-O1-Image-FP8 folder (~10-11 GB) plus HiDream_O1-ComfyUI nodes. Requires transformers>=4.57.1 (installed at startup).
notes_high: Downloads drbaph HiDream-O1-Image-BF16 folder (~18-20 GB) plus HiDream_O1-ComfyUI nodes. Targets 24GB+ VRAM.
description: HiDream O1 Image - local text/reference generation with optional LoRA training nodes.
